# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Experience unparalleled luxury at our crystal springs resort destination. Indulge in world-class amenities, stunning accommodations, and unforgettable moments. Book your escape today.

### Rooms
https://example.com/rooms
Immerse yourself in elegantly designed suites and rooms featuring modern comforts and breathtaking views. Find your perfect retreat at our resort hotel paradise.

### Experiences
https://example.com/experiences
Elevate your stay with curated experiences from spa treatments to adventure tours. Enjoy marriott all inclusive resorts quality with personalized service and endless possibilities.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Connect with our concierge team to plan your perfect getaway. American express fine hotels and resorts members enjoy exclusive benefits. Reach out now for personalized assistance.

### Products
https://example.com/products
Our Products - Santa Casa Resort

### Product Detail
https://example.com/product/:slug
Product Details - Santa Casa Resort

### Category
https://example.com/category/:slug
Products - Santa Casa Resort

## Legal & Policy

https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.
